keywords: GitHub code hosting version control git repositories pull requests CI/CD
description: Distributed code hosting platform with collaboration and CI/CD workflows
patterns: Git object store on distributed filesystem (each repo is a namespace)
PostgreSQL for metadata: repos, PRs, issues, users
Elasticsearch for code search across repositories
Kafka for event fan-out: webhooks, notifications, CI triggers
Worker fleet for CI/CD job scheduling with priority queues
CDN for raw file content and archive downloads
Redis for caching hot repo metadata and permission checks
